Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "BOOTY-4001" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Booty.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Forced this to use the BASIC RUN command so that the loading screen is displayed. To add the routine which waits for any key or the fire button on either joystick before entering the game, 256 bytes between $0A57 and $0B56 were zeroed out. This is fine, because the original dump contains a repeating 256 block of random data starting at $0A57 (the pattern repeats until the meaningful data starts at $6E00). Then added the key waiting routine at $0B00. And finally, altered the BASIC program to call our new routine at $0B00 (2816) after displaying the loading screen by changing line 100 from: 100 F=1:LOAD to: 100 SYS2816
The graphical loading screen was converted from the Spectrum version by Andy Green (https://www.facebook.com/AndyGreenPixelArt).
